Prompt StudioPrompt workbench

Guided prompt system for online stores

Ecommerce Prompt Studio

For store owners, ecommerce marketers, and the agencies who run their accounts. Pick a workflow, answer a few store-specific questions, and copy a finished prompt that produces product pages, cart recovery flows, and offer plans built on your numbers.

01 Add context→02 Pick a job→03 Copy the prompt
Studio contents
48 guided workflows

Step 1

Your business profile

0%context

Fill this once. Every workflow and advisor in this studio writes your answers into its prompt.

Saved on this device as you type.

Your workspace

Build something useful

Step 2

Pick a workflow

Each workflow asks for a few specifics, then builds a finished prompt you paste into ChatGPT, Claude, or the assistant you already use.

Your prompt is ready
Your inputs changed after this prompt was built. Build it again to refresh it.

                

                  
                  
                  
                

              

            

          


          

            
Expert modes

            
Sit down with an advisor

            
Each advisor prompt sets up a working session: the AI interviews you one question at a time, then delivers its recommendation and stays in the role.

            

            

              

              

              

                
                
                
              

            

          


          

            
Your collection

            
Prompt manual

            
Prompts you save land here. Reorder them, name the manual, then print it to PDF or download it as a file you can share with your team.

            

              
              
            

            
Nothing saved yetBuild a prompt in Workflows or Advisors, then hit "Add to manual".

            

            

              
              
              
            

          

        

      

      

      
    


    
Prompt StudioBuilt for focused work. Your profile stays on this device.
